name: Arm Holdings plc
description: Arm Holdings plc is a leading semiconductor and software design company that architects, develops, and licenses high-performance, low-cost, and energy-efficient CPU products and related technologies. Its primary business involves licensing intellectual property (IP) to semiconductor companies and original equipment manufacturers, who then use these designs to create their own chips. Arm's architecture is the most widely used in the world, powering everything from smartphones and tablets to supercomputers, automotive systems, and IoT devices. The company plays a critical role in the global technology ecosystem by providing the foundational compute platform for the digital age.
